full_text:
Yan Zhong
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Zhongwas born in Hanyang. Noted judge of character, he urged Huangfu Song to seize control of the government. Yan Zhong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Han Sui Dynasty. Yan Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
